LightningComponentBundle.description: Registers the basic wizard example pages (WizardPage1/2/3) with the wizard framework runtime registry. Must be placed on the same Experience Builder page as <c-wizard> so registration side-effects run at module load.

property.name: wizardTypeConfig
property.label: Wizard Type
property.description: Wizard type developer name (e.g. TEST) forwarded to the inner c-wizard.
